description: Composition Sleeveless round neck dress made of 100% polyester chiffon, fully lined, has tucks at the neck which open out below the waist, a belt tie at the back and print Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash delicate Do not bleach; Do not tumble dry Cool iron arrow woman caters to fashionistas with a taste for the exotic. This dress with its color-happy, mood lifting hues is sure to become a wardrobe favourite. Pair it with a bolero jacket, a vibrant scarf and sandals. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5.8" and chest 33"
